mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.deptment_id, e.regist_level_id, e.scheduling_id, e.realname, e.delmark, d.dept_name, r.regist_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.deptment_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level r ON e.regist_level_id = r.id WHERE e.deptment_id = #{deptmentId} AND e.delmark = 1 ORDER BY e.id

SELECT e.id, e.deptment_id, e.regist_level_id, e.scheduling_id, e.realname, e.delmark, d.dept_name, r.regist_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.deptment_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level r ON e.regist_level_id = r.id WHERE e.deptment_id = #{deptmentId} AND e.delmark = 1 ORDER BY r.sequence_no DESC NULLS LAST, e.id

SELECT e.id, e.deptment_id, e.regist_level_id, e.scheduling_id, e.realname, e.delmark, d.dept_name, r.regist_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.deptment_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level r ON e.regist_level_id = r.id WHERE e.deptment_id = #{deptmentId} AND e.regist_level_id = #{registLevelId} AND e.delmark = 1 ORDER BY e.id

SELECT e.id, e.deptment_id, e.regist_level_id, e.scheduling_id, e.realname, e.delmark, d.dept_name, r.regist_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.deptment_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level r ON e.regist_level_id = r.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
